creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
I didn't get notifications for my last 3 ports commits:
* c8b9f347e3345f34e5457e770184d3b678a7ba23
* 9a403e3bcfff29b6cdc266eea6f1cbecda7b4549
* 19bb305f64dc98138d63a9548663cdd174141586

I also didn't get a notification for this comment that was automatically added to Bugzilla by the commit notification:
* https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=264407#c2


There's something wrong with the mail server or some other parts of infrastructure.

Could somebody please take a look?


Thanks,
Yuri
